rationale.R1.2: Identifies a central logical contradiction and proposes specific fixes.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses all uncertainties and missing evidence clearly.
rationale.RX.3: Covers the exact active set without drift.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors or harmful content, though it does not address every potential harm.
rationale.RX.5: Provides detailed edits but does not trace sources.
